'''dobapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagocidal|imagocidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagocidal|imagocidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dobapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dobapithi|dobapithi]] || [[word:dobapiji|dobapiji]] || [[word:dobapishi|dobapishi]] || [[word:dobapiki|dobapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dobaputhuthu|dobaputhuthu]] || [[word:dobapujuju|dobapujuju]] || [[word:dobapushushu|dobapushushu]] || [[word:dobapukuku|dobapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dobaputhu|dobaputhu]] || [[word:dobapuju|dobapuju]] || [[word:dobapushu|dobapushu]] || [[word:dobapuku|dobapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dobapufthuf|dobapufthuf]] || [[word:dobapufjuf|dobapufjuf]] || [[word:dobapufshuf|dobapufshuf]] || [[word:dobapufkuf|dobapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dobapethe|dobapethe]] || [[word:dobapeje|dobapeje]] || [[word:dobapeshe|dobapeshe]] || [[word:dobapeke|dobapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dobapothotho|dobapothotho]] || [[word:dobapojojo|dobapojojo]] || [[word:dobaposhosho|dobaposhosho]] || [[word:dobapokoko|dobapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dobapotho|dobapotho]] || [[word:dobapojo|dobapojo]] || [[word:dobaposho|dobaposho]] || [[word:dobapoko|dobapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dobapofthof|dobapofthof]] || [[word:dobapofjof|dobapofjof]] || [[word:dobapofshof|dobapofshof]] || [[word:dobapofkof|dobapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfthÃŸf|dobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfjÃŸf|dobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfshÃŸf|dobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfkÃŸf|dobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dobapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dobapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dobapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dobapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfthÃŸf|dobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfjÃŸf|dobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfshÃŸf|dobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfkÃŸf|dobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfthÃŸf|dobapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfjÃŸf|dobapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfshÃŸf|dobapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dobapÃŸfkÃŸf|dobapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dobapÃḊthÃḊ|dobapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dobapÃḊjÃḊ|dobapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dobapÃḊshÃḊ|dobapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dobapÃḊkÃḊ|dobapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dobapathatha|dobapathatha]] || [[word:dobapajaja|dobapajaja]] || [[word:dobapashasha|dobapashasha]] || [[word:dobapakaka|dobapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dobapatha|dobapatha]] || [[word:dobapaja|dobapaja]] || [[word:dobapasha|dobapasha]] || [[word:dobapaka|dobapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dobapafthaf|dobapafthaf]] || [[word:dobapafjaf|dobapafjaf]] || [[word:dobapafshaf|dobapafshaf]] || [[word:dobapafkaf|dobapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dobapasha|dobapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dobapshÃḋsha|dobapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dobaprosha|dobaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dobapmusha|dobapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dobapyasha|dobapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godobapnkshÃḋsha|godobapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godobapnkrosha|godobapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godobapnkmusha|godobapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godobapnkyasha|godobapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dobabapasha|dobabapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dobabapshÃḋsha|dobabapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dobabaprosha|dobabaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dobabapmusha|dobabapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dobabapyasha|dobabapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godobabapnkshÃḋsha|godobabapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godobabapnkrosha|godobabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godobabapnkmusha|godobabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godobabapnkyasha|godobabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:debÃḊpasha|debÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:debÃḊpshÃḋsha|debÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:debÃḊprosha|debÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:debÃḊpmusha|debÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:debÃḊpyasha|debÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|godebÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godebÃḊpnkrosha|godebÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godebÃḊpnkmusha|godebÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godebÃḊpnkyasha|godebÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dobfapasha|dobfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dobfapshÃḋsha|dobfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dobfaprosha|dobfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dobfapmusha|dobfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dobfapyasha|dobfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godobfapnkshÃḋsha|godobfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godobfapnkrosha|godobfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godobfapnkmusha|godobfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godobfapnkyasha|godobfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
